page_metadata.biotools__summary: aCLImatise is a Python library and command-line utility for parsing the help output of a command-line tool and then outputting a description of the tool in a more structured format, for example a Common Workflow Language tool definition.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: aCLImatise is a Python library and command-line utility for parsing the help output of a command-line tool and then outputting a description of the tool in a more structured format, for example a Common Workflow Language tool definition.
